subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The Desired One calleth thee from His all-praised station unto God, the Mighty, the Loving - whosoever hath turned unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمود ان المقصود ینادیک من مقامه المحمود الی الله العزیز الودود من اقبل الیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @suffering and imprisonment
